title: Break & Continue 🛑
description: Take full control! Stop a loop early or skip directly to the next round.

slides.title: Emergency Stop 🚨

quizData.question: What happens when a loop encounters the `break` keyword?

options.text: It instantly exits the entire loop, moving on to the code below it.
It pauses the loop until the user clicks.

quizData.explanation: Break immediately terminates the whole loop structure.

slides.title: Skip a Turn ⏭️

quizData.question:
Fill in the blank to skip straight to the next loop iteration:
_____ ;
quizData.explanation: The 'continue' keyword skips the rest of the current loop iteration and moves directly to the next one.

slides.title: See it in Action
slides.content: We will print 1, 2, skip 3, print 4, and stop entirely at 5!
